privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env model_pv_soiling_impact task by executing a baseline and soiled PySAM.Pvwattsv8 simulation against a real NREL NSRDB typical meteorological year (TMY) weather file from Tucson, AZ. Confirmed that the output JSON schema, 2000 kW DC system parameters, and soiling profile explicitly match the task description instructions. The resulting baseline annual energy generation (~3.66M kWh), soiled energy generation (~3.54M kWh), ~3.2% soiling loss, and ~20.9% capacity factor correctly fall within the min/max expectation bounds defined by the verifier logic.
